Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Boomloom: Think with your hands 132 upvotes, 14 comments
  2. My first patch to the Linux kernel 128 upvotes, 17 comments
  3. Electronics for Kids, 2nd Edition 202 upvotes, 42 comments
  4. Show HN: Termcraft – Terminal-first 2D sandbox survival in Rust 118 upvotes, 22 comments
  5. Sashiko: An agentic Linux kernel code review system 31 upvotes, 3 comments
  6. 'Miracle': Europe reconnects with lost spacecraft 30 upvotes, 4 comments
  7. Some things just take time 728 upvotes, 233 comments
  8. Bayesian statistics for confused data scientists 132 upvotes, 34 comments
  9. Floci – A free, open-source local AWS emulator 207 upvotes, 61 comments
  10. Hormuz Minesweeper – Are you tired of winning? 217 upvotes, 65 comments
  11. Professional video editing, right in the browser with WebGPU and WASM 286 upvotes, 100 comments
  12. 25 Years of Eggs 59 upvotes, 15 comments
  13. Grafeo – A fast, lean, embeddable graph database built in Rust 225 upvotes, 79 comments
  14. Trivy ecosystem supply chain briefly compromised 76 upvotes, 23 comments
  15. Hide macOS Tahoe's Menu Icons 226 upvotes, 85 comments
  16. Do Not Turn Child Protection into Internet Access Control 720 upvotes, 373 comments
  17. The three pillars of JavaScript bloat 340 upvotes, 179 comments
  18. Tinybox – A powerful computer for deep learning 509 upvotes, 292 comments
  19. Linking Smaller Haskell Binaries (2023) 12 upvotes, 2 comments
  20. Alpha Micro AM-1000E and AM-1200 19 upvotes, 5 comments
  21. Thinking Fast, Slow, and Artificial: How AI Is Reshaping Human Reasoning 161 upvotes, 90 comments
  22. Show HN: Oku – One tab to filter out noise from feeds and content sources 5 upvotes, 0 comments
  23. Chest Fridge (2009) 125 upvotes, 73 comments
  24. It's Their Mona Lisa 33 upvotes, 14 comments
  25. Cloudflare flags archive.today as "C&C/Botnet"; no longer resolves via 1.1.1.2 201 upvotes, 144 comments
  26. Cross-Model Void Convergence: GPT-5.2 and Claude Opus 4.6 Deterministic Silence 33 upvotes, 17 comments
  27. Training Center for Maneuvering on Manned Model Ships 16 upvotes, 6 comments
  28. HopTab–free,open source macOS app switcher and tiler that replaces Cmd+Tab 34 upvotes, 18 comments
  29. Show HN: Time Keep – Location timezones, timers, alarms, countdowns in one place 13 upvotes, 6 comments
  30. Flash-Moe: Running a 397B Parameter Model on a Mac with 48GB RAM 3 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 8:00pm, 22 March 2026. Source here.
